rootCauseHypothesis:
TEST BLOCKED

The test could not be run — the admin sign-in failed and the admin area (required for the Kanban/drag-drop) cannot be reached without valid credentials.

- Three login attempts were made using the provided email; the entered passwords returned the same credentials error.
- The Manajemen Waktu / Kanban board could not be accessed because authentication did not succeed.
